evals.prompt: Take this all the way — I want to build a real-time collaborative whiteboard app with drawing tools, sticky notes, and video chat. Full pipeline from idea to deploy.
evals.expected_output: Creates state file with pipeline=full. Runs all 6 stages: office-hours (validates whiteboard idea) → brainstorm (explores design for drawing, notes, video) → design-doc (per-feature specs) → write-plan (implementation plan) → GATE (user approves) → subagent-dev (builds it) → GATE (user approves) → ship (PR + deploy). Two hard gates before implementation and before shipping.

evals.prompt: 아이디어부터 배포까지 해줘. 사내 점심 주문 시스템 — 메뉴 선택, 주문, 결제, 배달 추적 기능이 필요해.
evals.expected_output: Full pipeline in Korean context. 6 stages with state tracking. office-hours validates lunch ordering idea → brainstorm explores design → design-doc for menu, order, payment, delivery features → write-plan → user gate → subagent-dev implements → user gate → ship deploys. State file persists progress.

evals.prompt: I already ran pipeline-idea and the plan is at docs/plans/notification-system.md. The pipeline-state.json shows all four idea stages completed. Now take it the rest of the way — build and ship it.
evals.expected_output: Detects existing pipeline-state.json with pipeline=idea and all stages completed. Skips stages 1-4 entirely. Converts state to full pipeline format. Presents pre-implementation gate with existing plan. On approval, runs subagent-dev to implement, then gate, then ship. Does NOT re-run office-hours, brainstorm, design-doc, or write-plan.
